title: LANE COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES - 211info
text: LANE COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES LANE COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services, licensing, investigating animal cruelty complaints, assisting injured/sick animals and reports of aggressive dog behavior. Offers a spay/neuter voucher program. 3050 N Delta Highway Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 682-3645 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-3645 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County (unincorporated areas only) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Lane Transit District Bus 66 Services: Animal Control Animal Licenses Veterinary Care Expense Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
